meta.default_title: VTC.solutions | Premium Private Transfers & Long Distance
meta.default_description: Professional VTC services in Saint-Jean-de-Luz, Biarritz, and the wider Basque region. Door-to-door local transfers and international long-distance travel.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Service
terms.service_desc: Our services consist of providing a chauffeur-driven vehicle (VTC) for private or professional transport. All rides must be booked in advance.
terms.pricing_desc: Prices are communicated at the time of booking and include 10% VAT (Transport). For long distances or night shifts, surcharges may apply. Payment is due upon booking.
terms.cancellation_desc: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the pickup time are fully refunded. Cancellations within 24 hours are subject to a 50% fee. 'No-shows' are charged at 100%.
terms.insurance_text: VTC.solutions holds Professional Liability Insurance (RCP) covering risks related to its passenger transport activities for hire, in accordance with Article L. 3120-4 of the French Transport Code. This insurance covers physical, material, and consequential damages caused to passengers and third parties.
terms.insurance_details: Transport services are covered by a 'Professional Vehicle Insurance' policy specifically for passenger transport for hire, providing unlimited coverage for personal injury.
